description: Review the following diff. It adds a PATCH /users/:id endpoint. Find all issues.
expected_behavior: Review identifies at least: (1) missing authentication check comment — the endpoint allows any caller to change any user's email, (2) the update does not validate email format, (3) the success response uses res.json(user) after mutation, which is correct — this is NOT an issue.

success_criteria.description: Review flags that any caller can update any user's email (no auth/ownership check)
success_criteria.rubric: Does the review identify the missing authorization check — that the endpoint allows any unauthenticated caller to modify any user's email address?

success_criteria.description: Review flags that email is not validated for format
success_criteria.rubric: Does the review note that the email field is accepted without any format validation (e.g. no @ check, no regex), allowing arbitrary strings to be stored?

success_criteria.description: Review produces a verdict (approved or changes-requested)
Review assigns severity to each finding
success_criteria.rubric: Does each finding in the review include a severity label (critical, high, medium, or low)?
